case_title: JPMORGAN CHASE BANK VS. FERNANDO PADILLA

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 76812882)
